data.current_description: Generate a custom QR code with optional logo, colors, and design settings. Returns the QR code as an image.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a custom QR code with optional logo, colors, and design settings. Accepts a QrCodeRequest object containing the data to encode and QrCodeConfig settings for customization. Returns the QR code as an image in the requested format (PNG, SVG, PDF, or EPS). The generated QR code is created on-demand and can be immediately downloaded or embedded.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about input schema (QrCodeRequest), supported output formats, and operational context. Added details about the request schema structure, explicit format options, and clarified that the QR code is generated on-demand for better AI agent understanding of capabilities and constraints.

data.current_description: Generate a custom QR code using query parameters.
data.summary_suggestion: Generate custom QR code via query parameters
data.description_suggestion: Generates a custom QR code using query parameters instead of a request body. Accepts parameters for data to encode, logo image URL, color settings, and design options. Returns the QR code as an image in the requested format (PNG, SVG, PDF, or EPS). This GET endpoint provides an alternative to the POST method for simpler integrations or URL-based generation.

data.current_description: Upload a logo image to be used in QR code generation.
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a logo image file to be embedded in QR code designs. Accepts image files in common formats (PNG, JPG, GIF, etc.). Returns a reference ID or URL that can be used in subsequent QR code generation requests via the logo parameter. Uploaded images are temporarily stored and can be referenced in QrCodeConfig settings for custom QR code creation.
data.reasoning: Description lacks critical details about accepted file formats, what the operation returns (reference ID or URL), and how the uploaded logo is used in the workflow.
